arts.ttl: Tottenham suffer new injury concern before Frankfurt clash as attacker 'sent for scans' on hamstring issue
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur allegedly suffer a brand-new injury blow, as attacker Wilson Odobert is sent for scans after complaining of hamstring tightness.

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Eintracht Frankfurt Betting Preview: Backing another Bentancur Europa League booking
arts.sum: Tottenham face a testing Europa League quarter-final as they take on Eintracht Frankfurt in their bid to end a lengthy wait for silverware. Spurs bounced back from successive league defeats with a 3-1...

arts.ttl: Report: Tottenham now decide whether they want to sell Destiny Udogie amid Manchester City links
9 players to miss Tottenham vs Frankfurt with Van de Ven absence explained as key star ruled out
arts.sum: As for Frankfurt, Dino Topppmoller looks set to be without some key players including striker Elye Wahi, the replacement for Omar Marmoush, and Ansgar Knauff. Eintracht Frankfurt will have twice as many players than Tottenham absent for their Europa League quarter-final first leg on Thursday evening.

arts.ttl: What Djed Spence said ahead of Desire Doue masterclass as Arsenal sent Champions League warning
arts.sum: Desire Doue proved to be a pivotal figure on Wednesday evening as PSG claimed a 3-1 win over Aston Villa in the first leg of their Champions League quarter-final tie. That's where Spence came across Doue, with the duo going on to play together in nine of the Tottenham man's 10 games for the Ligue 1 outfit.

arts.ttl: Tottenham to make their move for 19-year-old defender – Jose Mourinho has been contacted
arts.sum: According to a claim in the Turkish media, Tottenham Hotspur are looking to step in their pursuit of Fenerbahce defender Yusuf Akçiçek, and have even contacted Jose Mourinho. The 19-year-old has recently been linked with a move to the Premier League side after impressing for the Istanbul club this season. arts.ttl: Tottenham drop early Brennan Johnson team news hint for Frankfurt amid Ange Postecoglou dilemma
arts.sum: We had to use games where we needed those guys to play because, otherwise, if I'd kept playing Brennan we would be at a point now where Wilson, Destiny... Wilson Odobert started the last European game at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium and also scored twice which gives Postecoglou a huge call to make on the right of his front three.

arts.ttl: Tottenham transfer news: Spurs 'preparing summer swoop' for £50m-rated Premier League defender
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are reportedly preparing a summer swoop for a Premier League defender who is valued at around £50m.

arts.ttl: Report: Tottenham now told to pay £17m in compensation after making contact to hire 'exciting' manager
arts.sum: Tottenham are looking to replace Ange Postecoglou this summer – but a new hire might not be cheap. The Australian still has two years remaining...

arts.ttl: Micky van de Ven agent casts doubt over Tottenham star's future with 'big club' claim
arts.sum: The agent of Spurs defender Micky van de Ven has cast doubt over the defender's long-term future with the club, stating he could "one day play for a big club like Real Madrid". "Micky also has the level to one day play for a big club like Real Madrid.
